login.title: Sign in to Ceremonio
login.guest_hint: You can sign in as a guest and try all the features. Anything you do there is not permanent and isn't linked to an email.
login.register_hint: No account yet? The first user creates the wedding and declares their partner's email. The partner then signs up with their own password.
register.title: ✨ Create an account
register.hint: If you're the first to create the wedding, also fill in your partner's email. If you're the partner who was already declared, leave the partner email empty and just enter your own email and password.
register.connect_hint: Enter the email your partner declared for you, plus your own password. You'll be connected to the same wedding.
install.help: To install: on iPhone tap Share → Add to Home Screen. On desktop, use the install icon in the address bar.
mode.guest_banner: 👀 Guest mode: you're trying the app without permanent storage. Create an account to keep your data.
guests.title: 💍 Guest Management
guests.search_ph: Type a name, phone, email, group or RSVP...
group.name: Group name
meta.description: Ceremonio — organise your wedding or event: guests, RSVPs, budget, seating, playlist and invitations, all in one place.
lp.hero_title: Plan your wedding, without the chaos.
lp.hero_sub: Guests, RSVPs, budget, seating and playlist — all in one beautiful, free tool.
lp.f_guests_d: Organise guests into groups and send personal RSVP links with a deadline.
lp.f_invites_d: Pick a theme and send an online invite that opens in one tap.
lp.f_budget_d: Track expenses, estimates and payments against your budget.
lp.f_seating_d: Design tables and seat guests with drag & drop.
lp.f_playlist_d: Build your music by moment and export it for the DJ.
lp.f_bilingual_d: In Greek and English, installs to your phone's home screen.
lp.s1_d: Set up your wedding and invite your partner.
lp.s2_d: Organise groups and send RSVP invitations.
lp.s3_d: Budget, seating, music — all in one place.
lp.final_sub: Free, no card. Set up your wedding in minutes.
lp.demo_note: 👀 Check out the app with no sign-up — enter as a guest and try every feature!
lp.f_try_d: Check out the app with no login required — browse everything freely.
lp.dl_sub: Install it in one tap and open it from your home screen whenever you need it.
download.title: Get Ceremonio
download.subtitle: Install the app on your device in a few seconds.
download.already: The app is already installed on this device.
download.action_hint: Tap the button to install the app on your device.
download.waiting: Getting it ready… keep this open
download.ios_line: 🍎 On iPhone: tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.
download.android_line: 🤖 Open the menu (⋮) and choose “Install app”.
download.desktop_line: 💻 Click the install icon (⊕) in the address bar of Chrome or Edge.
download.android_s2: Choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”
download.desktop_hint: In Chrome or Edge, click the install icon (⊕) at the right end of the address bar.
download.share_hint: Send this link to a friend so they can install it too:
th.name: Name
guests.empty_all: Create a group first to add guests!
group.confirm_delete: Delete this group? Only allowed if it has no guests.
settings.title: 💌 Online Invitation Details
settings.hint: These details will appear on every online invitation you send via link to your guests.
settings.maker_intro: Build your own look: pick a font and colours, or start from a ready-made style. The preview updates live.
settings.maker_emoji_hint: Pick a symbol shown under the names (and optionally as a background pattern). Press ✕ for none.
settings.maker_pattern_hint: Repeats the symbol across the background. 0 = off. Requires a chosen symbol.
settings.maker_preview_hint: Open the full preview to see the whole invitation. Remember to press save to keep your changes.
settings.maker_sample_sub: We joyfully invite you to our wedding!
settings.preview_hint: Save first, then open the preview to see the final result.
settings.koumparoi_ph: e.g. Maid of honour: Eleni Papadopoulou
settings.iban_owner_ph: e.g. Maria Papadopoulou or Nikos Nikolaou
settings.iban_hint: The IBAN will appear on the invitation and a QR code will be generated automatically.
settings.rsvp_hint: After the RSVP deadline the public link shows an expiry message. You can always change RSVP manually from the app.
settings.sides_hint: Leave blank for the defaults, or use anything that fits you (e.g. names, "X family"). Applies everywhere in the app.
backup.title: 💾 Export / Import Data
backup.export_hint: Downloads a JSON file with groups, guests, RSVP, finances, playlist, invitation details and party layout.
backup.import_hint: Warning: import replaces the current app data with the data from the backup. Export first for safety.
backup.import_confirm: Proceed with import? Current data will be replaced.
budget.title: 💰 Wedding Budget
budget.notes_ph: e.g. second instalment remaining, agreement with supplier etc.
playlist.title: Playlist / Wedding Music
playlist.notes_ph: e.g. play at the start, not too loud, acoustic version etc.
playlist.empty_category: No songs added in this category yet.
analytics.title: Wedding Analytics
analytics.empty: No groups / guests to analyse yet.
invite.preview_banner: 👁️ Invitation preview — RSVP is not saved from here.
invite.iban_qr_hint: The QR code contains the IBAN so it can be scanned easily.
invite.iban_copy_fail: Could not copy automatically. You can select it and copy it manually.
invite.plus_one_hint: If you answer that you won't come, companions will be set to zero automatically.
invite.diet_notes_ph: e.g. allergy, children's menu, special preference etc.
invite_expired.heading: ⏳ The RSVP deadline has passed
invite_expired.body: Dear {name}, the online RSVP form is no longer accepting responses.
invite_thanks.heading: 💌 Thank you, {name}!
invite_thanks.body: Your response has been recorded successfully.
invite_thanks.reopen_hint: You can reopen the same link if you need to change your answer.
flash.no_wedding_linked: No wedding is linked to your account. Create a new wedding or sign in with the email your partner declared.
flash.fill_email_password: Please fill in your email and password.
flash.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in.
flash.account_created_joined_wedding: Your account was created and you have been joined to the wedding that declared you as a partner.
flash.partner_email_required: If you are creating a new wedding, you must also provide your partner's email.
flash.wedding_created: Wedding created. When your partner registers with the declared email they will be linked to the same wedding with their own password.
flash.guest_mode_entered: You have entered guest mode. You can try everything, but data is not permanent.
flash.group_has_guests: You cannot delete this group because it has guests in it.
flash.invalid_image_type: Image must be jpg, png, webp or gif.
flash.no_backup_file: Please select a backup JSON file first.
flash.invalid_backup_file: The file is not a valid JSON backup.
flash.import_success: Backup imported successfully into the current wedding.
